\tzpentry{ID4977}{Chemical Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4977 introduces Chemical Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.

$effc2,peff,peff,peff)T_{matter}\\^{}{\\mu\\nu} = \\\\operatorname{diag}(\\rho_{eff} c\\^{}2, p_{eff}, p_{eff}, p_{eff})Tmatter$
